# MCP Lifecycle Operator — knowledge

## fact
- [MCP Lifecycle Operator overview](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/fact-mcp-lifecycle-operator-overview.md) — Kubernetes operator (kubernetes-sigs) providing declarative MCPServer CRD for deploying and managing MCP servers — bundled in RHOAI operator for 3.5, used by MCP Catalog and MCP Registry.
- [MCPLO key decisions from Slack (Feb-Jul 2026)](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/fact-mcplo-key-decisions-from-slack.md) — 10 major architecture and process decisions from
- [MCPLO three-repo architecture pattern](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/fact-mcplo-three-repo-architecture.md) — RHOAI integrates the lifecycle operator through three repos -- upstream (kubernetes-sigs), module operator (opendatahub-io), and parent operator (opendatahub-io) -- with a two-tier image pattern.
- [MCPServer CRD technical details](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/fact-mcpserver-crd.md) — The MCPServer custom resource (mcp.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1) -- spec fields, auto-created resources, status conditions, and discovery URL pattern.

## person
- [Ju Lim](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/person-ju-lim.md) — Sr. Manager, Product Management, Hybrid Platforms -- drives OCP5 Intelligent Platform / applied AI story, MCPLO productization, RHOAI Limited packaging.

## qa
- [Does the MCP Lifecycle Operator have dependencies or deploy servers by default?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/qa-mcplo-dependencies-defaults.md) — Field QA -- MCPLO has no Gateway dependency, deploys no servers by default, supports Day 2 server additions via catalog or CRDs.
- [Where do MCPLO docs live and who qualifies it?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/qa-mcplo-documentation-qualification.md) — Field QA -- documentation lives in RHOAI docs (not OCP docs); qualification is joint between OCP team (functional) and RHOAI team (deployment/integration).
- [How is the MCP Lifecycle Operator distributed and installed?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/qa-mcplo-installation-distribution.md) — Field QA -- MCPLO is bundled with RHOAI operator (not standalone OLM), disconnected via RHOAI offline bundle, updates via RHOAI releases. Upstream available for BYO.

## question
- [How is the MCP server catalog delivered to disconnected customers?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/question-disconnected-catalog-delivery.md) — Open -- no oc-mirror equivalent for MCP catalog in disconnected mode has been defined yet.
- [OLS transition to MCPLO-deployed OCP MCP server](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/question-ols-mcplo-transition.md) — Open -- OLS currently uses its own internal OCP MCP server; when MCPLO is productized, OLS will ask users to install via MCPLO. Transition plan and subscription implications unclear.

## reference
- [Manage MCP servers on Red Hat OpenShift with the MCP lifecycle operator (blog)](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-dp-announcement-blog.md) — Public Red Hat blog announcing MCPLO v0.1.0 Dev Preview -- MCPServer CRD walkthrough, security defaults, MCP Catalog integration.
- [MCP Gateway integration proposal (aliok, May 2026)](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-gateway-integration-proposal.md) — Formal design document for MCPLO-Gateway integration -- HTTPRoute-based registration, SSA status updates, auth integration. Drives OCPMCP-347 (GA scope).
- [NSA MCP Security Guidance (June 2026)](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-nsa-mcp-security-guidance.md) — NSA/CISA cybersecurity information sheet on MCP security -- isolation, egress allowlists, input validation, host shell blocking. Key external reference for MCP server security posture.
- [OCPMCP-347: MCP Gateway integration (GA scope)](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-ocpmcp-347-gateway-integration.md) — Gateway integration for MCPLO -- deferred from TP to GA scope. Formal proposal doc by aliok (May 2026). HTTPRoute-based server registration with MCP Gateway.
- [OCPSTRAT-2879: MCP lifecycle operator GA (OCP-side)](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-ocpstrat-2879-mcplo-ga.md) — OCP-side General Availability feature for the MCP Lifecycle Operator -- full lifecycle management, Gateway integration, network policies, Prometheus monitors, Agent Sandbox/Code Mode support.
- [OCPSTRAT-3263: MCP lifecycle operator TP (OCP-side)](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-ocpstrat-3263-mcplo-tp.md) — OCP-side Technology Preview feature for the MCP Lifecycle Operator -- CRD-based MCPServer API, RBAC, install-time and Day 2 server management, targeting mid-July 2026.
- [RHAISTRAT-1339: RHOAI Outcome for MCP Lifecycle Operator](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-rhaistrat-1339-rhoai-outcome.md) — RHOAI Outcome STRAT for the MCP Lifecycle Operator productization.
- [RHAISTRAT-1773: MCP Lifecycle Operator TP Productization](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-rhaistrat-1773-tp-productization.md) — Technology Preview productization STRAT for the MCP Lifecycle Operator in RHOAI.
- [RHAISTRAT-1995: MCP Lifecycle Operator General Availability](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-rhaistrat-1995-mcplo-ga.md) — GA feature for the MCP Lifecycle Operator in RHOAI -- graduating from TP to full production support with dependency awareness, operational maturity, and documentation.
- [RHOAIENG-65512: MCPLO RHOAI productization epic](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-rhoaieng-65512-productization-epic.md) — Main RHOAI productization epic for the MCP Lifecycle Operator -- highest-activity Jira in the Slack channel (5 references). Covers Konflux builds, testing, TLS, multi-arch.
- [#forum-mcp-lifecycle-operator (Slack channel)](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-slack-forum-mcp-lifecycle-operator.md) — Slack channel for MCP Lifecycle Operator discussion -- cross-team (OCP + RHOAI). Reviewed 2026-07-11 (2,406 msgs, 47 participants, 484 URLs, Feb-Jul 2026).
- [Toolhive (Stacklok) -- closest K8s-native MCP lifecycle competitor](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-toolhive-stacklok-repo.md) — K8s operator with MCPServer CRD, auto-RBAC, vMCP gateway, OIDC, semantic tool search. Created by K8s co-founder Craig McLuckie. Enterprise edition available.
- [kubernetes-sigs/mcp-lifecycle-operator (upstream)](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/ref-upstream-repo.md) — Upstream Kubernetes operator repo for declarative MCP server deployment -- SIG Apps governance, Apache-2.0, Go.
